channel.title: 老季笔记
channel.description: This is my new Hugo FixIt site

item.title: 在Hestia CP中添加thinkphp模版
item.description:
<h1 id="环境" class="heading-element"><span>环境</span>
 <a href="#%e7%8e%af%e5%a2%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>ubuntu + hestia cp</p>
<h1 id="为thinkphp-添加php-fpm模版" class="heading-element"><span>为thinkphp 添加php-fpm模版</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%bathinkphp-%e6%b7%bb%e5%8a%a0php-fpm%e6%a8%a1%e7%89%88" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>
<p>首先通过SSH链接到远程主机</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">cd</span> /usr/local/hestia/data/templates/web/nginx/php-fpm
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">vim thinkphp.tpl</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12

</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35

</span><span class="lnt">38

</span><span class="lnt">42
</span><span class="lnt">43
</span><span class="lnt">44
</span><span class="lnt">45
</span><span class="lnt">46
</span><span class="lnt">47

</span><span class="lnt">53
</span><span class="lnt">54
</span><span class="lnt">55

</span><span class="lnt">57
</span><span class="lnt">58

</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-nginx" data-lang="nginx"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">server</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">listen</span> <span class="s">%ip%:%web_port%</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">server_name</span> <span class="s">%domain_idn%</span> <span class="s">%alias_idn%</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">root</span> <span class="s">%docroot%/public</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">index</span> <span class="s">index.php</span> <span class="s">index.html</span> <span class="s">index.htm</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">access_log</span> <span class="s">/var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.log</span> <span class="s">combined</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">access_log</span> <span class="s">/var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.bytes</span> <span class="s">bytes</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">error_log</span> <span class="s">/var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.error.log</span> <span class="s">error</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">include</span> <span class="s">%home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.forcessl.conf*</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s">/favicon.ico</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">log_not_found</span> <span class="no">off</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">access_log</span> <span class="no">off</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="p">=</span> <span class="s">/robots.txt</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">allow</span> <span class="s">all</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">log_not_found</span> <span class="no">off</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">access_log</span> <span class="no">off</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># 隐藏特定文件
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="p">~</span><span class="sr">*</span> <span class="s">/(README\.md|composer\.json|composer\.lock|\.git)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">deny</span> <span class="s">all</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">return</span> <span class="mi">404</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># 静态文件处理，防止对静态文件执行 PHP
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="p">~</span><span class="sr">*</span> <span class="s">\.(jpg|jpeg|gif|png|css|js|ico|webp|tiff|ttf|svg|eot|woff|otf|woff2|mp4|ogg|ogv|webm)</span>$ <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">expires</span> <span class="s">7d</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">access_log</span> <span class="no">off</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">add_header</span> <span class="s">Cache-Control</span> <span class="s">&#34;public,</span> <span class="s">no-transform&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># PHP 文件处理
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="p">~</span> <span class="sr">\.php$</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">try_files</span> <span class="nv">$uri</span> <span class="p">=</span><span class="mi">404</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">include</span> <span class="s">/etc/nginx/fastcgi_params</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">fastcgi_index</span> <span class="s">index.php</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">fastcgi_param</span> <span class="s">SCRIPT_FILENAME</span> <span class="nv">$document_root$fastcgi_script_name</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">fastcgi_pass</span> <span class="s">%backend_lsnr%</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">include</span> <span class="s">%home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.fastcgi_cache.conf*</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># 其他 fastcgi 相关参数...
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># URL 重写规则，适用于 ThinkPHP 6
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">location</span> <span class="s">/</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">try_files</span> <span class="nv">$uri</span> <span class="nv">$uri/</span> <span class="s">/index.php</span><span class="nv">$is_args$args</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># try_files $uri /index.php$is_args$args; crmeb自带
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">if</span> <span class="s">(!-e</span> <span class="nv">$request_filename</span><span class="s">)</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kn">rewrite</span> <span class="s">^(.*)</span>$ <span class="s">/index.php?s=</span><span class="nv">$1</span> <span class="s">last</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="kn">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># 其他配置...
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kn">include</span> <span class="s">%home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.conf_*</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">#=========================================================================#</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h1 id="default-web-domain-template" class="heading-element"><span>Default Web Domain Template </span>
 <a href="#default-web-domain-template" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h1 id="do-not-modify-this-file-changes-will-be-lost-when-rebuilding-domains" class="heading-element"><span>DO NOT MODIFY THIS FILE! CHANGES WILL BE LOST WHEN REBUILDING DOMAINS </span>
 <a href="#do-not-modify-this-file-changes-will-be-lost-when-rebuilding-domains" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h1 id="httpshestiacpcomdocsserver-administrationweb-templateshtml" class="heading-element"><span><a href="https://hestiacp.com/docs/server-administration/web-templates.html"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">https://hestiacp.com/docs/server-administration/web-templates.html</a> </span>
 <a href="#httpshestiacpcomdocsserver-administrationweb-templateshtml" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>#=========================================================================#</p>
<p>server {
listen %ip%:%web_ssl_port% ssl;
server_name %domain_idn% %alias_idn%;
root %sdocroot%/public; # 确保指向 public 目录
index index.php index.html index.htm;
access_log /var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.log combined;
access_log /var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.bytes bytes;
error_log /var/log/nginx/domains/%domain%.error.log error;</p>
<pre><code>ssl_certificate %ssl_pem%;
ssl_certificate_key %ssl_key%;
ssl_stapling on;
ssl_stapling_verify on;

# TLS 1.3 0-RTT anti-replay
if ($anti_replay = 307) { return 307 https://$host$request_uri; }
if ($anti_replay = 425) { return 425; }

include %home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.hsts.conf*;

location = /favicon.ico {
 log_not_found off;
 access_log off;
}

location = /robots.txt {
 allow all;
 log_not_found off;
 access_log off;
}

# 隐藏敏感文件
location ~ /(README\.md|composer\.json|composer\.lock|\.git) {
 deny all;
 return 404;
}

# 静态文件处理
location ~* \.(jpg|jpeg|gif|png|css|js|ico|webp|tiff|ttf|svg|eot|woff|otf|woff2|mp4|ogg|ogv|webm)$ {
 expires 7d;
 access_log off;
}

# PHP 文件处理
location ~ \.php$ {
 try_files $uri =404;
 include /etc/nginx/fastcgi_params;
 fastci_index index.php;
 fastcgi_param SCRIPT_FILENAME $document_root$fastcgi_script_name;
 fastcgi_pass %backend_lsnr%;

 include %home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.fastcgi_cache.conf*;
}

# ThinkPHP 6 URL 重写规则
location / {
 try_files $uri $uri/ /index.php$is_args$args;
}

include %home%/%user%/conf/web/%domain%/nginx.ssl.conf_*;
</code></pre>
<p>}</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>

item.title: 在vps(Ubuntu)中安装frps访问内网资源
item.description:
<h1 id="准备工作" class="heading-element"><span>准备工作</span>
 <a href="#%e5%87%86%e5%a4%87%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>一台具有公网IP的VPS，如果没有的话可以购买 <a href="https://www.interserver.net/r/938272"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">InterServer</a></li>
<li>任意 SSH 终端软件 <a href="https://www.xshell.com/zh/free-for-home-school/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">XShell</a>、<a href="http://www.hostbuf.com/t/988.html"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">免费国产FinalShell</a>、<a href="https://git-scm.com/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">git-windows</a></li>
<li>最好再有一个域名</li>
</ul>
<h1 id="什么是frphttpsgithubcomfatedierfrp" class="heading-element"><span>什么是<a href="https://github.com/fatedier/frp"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">frp</a></span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e6%98%affrphttpsgithubcomfatedierfrp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>frp 是一个专注于内网穿透的高性能的反向代理应用，支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP、HTTPS 等多种协议。</p>
<h1 id="配置以及安装-frp" class="heading-element"><span>配置以及安装 frp</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e4%bb%a5%e5%8f%8a%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85-frp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>
<p>通过SSH连接到远程主机，下载 frp</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 下载最新的 frp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">wget https://github.com/fatedier/frp/releases/download/v0.53.2/frp_0.53.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>解压文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">tar -zxvf frp_0.53.2_linux_amd64.tar.gz</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>配置 frp</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo mv frp_0.53.2_linux_amd64/frps /usr/bin
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo mkdir /etc/frp
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 创建并编辑 frps.ini 配置文件</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo nano /etc/frp/frps.ini</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在 <code>frps.ini</code> 文件中添加以下内容：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-ini" data-lang="ini"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">bindPort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">7000</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">auth.token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;123456&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 其他配置...</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>设置 frp 为系统服务并启动</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo nano /etc/systemd/system/frps.service</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在 <code>frps.service</code> 文件中添加以下内容：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-ini" data-lang="ini"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">[Unit]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">Description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">FRP Server</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">After</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">network.target</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">[Service]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">Type</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">simple</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">User</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">root</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">ExecStart</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">/usr/bin/frps -c /etc/frp/frps.ini</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">[Install]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">WantedBy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s">multi-user.target</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>启动并启用 frp 服务：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo systemctl start frps
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo systemctl <span class="nb">enable</span> frps</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<p>到这里VPS端就配置完成</p>
<h1 id="配置-内网-端" class="heading-element"><span>配置 内网 端</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae-%e5%86%85%e7%bd%91-%e7%ab%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>编辑 frpc.ini 文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-ini" data-lang="ini"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#serverAddr = &#34;your vps ip&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">serverAddr</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;192.168.1.123&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">serverPort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">7000</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#auth.token和服务端相同</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">auth.token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;123456&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">[[proxies]]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;test-tcp&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;tcp&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">localIP</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;192.168.2.168&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">localPort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">3389</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">remotePort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">3389</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">[[proxies]]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;api&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;tcp&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">localIP</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;192.168.2.4&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">localPort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">8080</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="na">remotePort</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">8080</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在客户端运行 frpc。</p>
<h1 id="结语" class="heading-element"><span>结语</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%93%e8%af%ad" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>通过以上步骤，已经成功在 Ubuntu VPS 上部署了 frp 用于内网穿透,
,然后就可以通过外网的3389端口来访问内网的3389端口. 8080访问内网的8080端口.</p>

item.title: 在CentOS 8 vps中搭建nodejs环境
item.description:
<h1 id="准备工作" class="heading-element"><span>准备工作</span>
 <a href="#%e5%87%86%e5%a4%87%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>一台VPS 如果没有的话可以购买 <a href="https://www.interserver.net/r/938272"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">InterServer</a></li>
<li>任意 SSH 终端软件 <a href="https://www.xshell.com/zh/free-for-home-school/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">XShell</a> 、 <a href="http://www.hostbuf.com/t/988.html"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">免费国产FinalShell</a>、<a href="https://git-scm.com/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">git-windows</a></li>
<li>最好再有一个域名</li>
</ul>
<h1 id="配置以及安装" class="heading-element"><span>配置以及安装</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e4%bb%a5%e5%8f%8a%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>首先通过SSH链接到远程主机
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#首先导入 NodeSource 仓库</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">curl -fsSL https://rpm.nodesource.com/setup_20.x <span class="p">|</span> sudo bash -
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#更新系统</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo dnf update
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#安装需要的工具</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo dnf install git
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo dnf install vim
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo dnf install nodejs
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">npm install -g pnpm
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">npm install -g npm@10.2.5</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>开放防火墙端口
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo firewall-cmd --zone<span class="o">=</span>public --add-port<span class="o">=</span>8067/tcp --permanent
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo firewall-cmd --zone<span class="o">=</span>public --add-port<span class="o">=</span>80/tcp --permanent
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo firewall-cmd --zone<span class="o">=</span>public --add-port<span class="o">=</span>443/tcp --permanent
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo firewall-cmd --reload
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo firewall-cmd --list-ports</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>

item.title: 在Ubuntu中安装海外Hestia CP服务器管理面板
item.description:
<h1 id="准备工作" class="heading-element"><span>准备工作</span>
 <a href="#%e5%87%86%e5%a4%87%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>一台VPS 如果没有的话可以购买 <a href="https://www.interserver.net/r/938272"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">InterServer</a></li>
<li>任意 SSH 终端软件 <a href="https://www.xshell.com/zh/free-for-home-school/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">XShell</a> 、 <a href="http://www.hostbuf.com/t/988.html"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">免费国产FinalShell</a>、<a href="https://git-scm.com/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">git-windows</a></li>
<li>最好再有一个域名</li>
</ul>
<h1 id="配置以及安装" class="heading-element"><span>配置以及安装</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e4%bb%a5%e5%8f%8a%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><ul>
<li>
<p>首先通过SSH链接到远程主机</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#更新系统</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">apt-get update
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#如弹出选择框按需要选择然后回车</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">apt-get upgrade</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>关闭所有iptables规则,非必须.在我的oracle免费主机上需要执行该脚本</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -P INPUT ACCEPT
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -P FORWARD ACCEPT
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -P OUTPUT ACCEPT
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -F
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -X
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t nat -F
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t nat -X
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t mangle -F
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t mangle -X
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t raw -F
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t raw -X
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t security -F
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables -t security -X
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo iptables-save <span class="p">|</span> sudo tee /etc/iptables/rules.v4</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>访问<a href="https://hestiacp.com/install.html"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Hestia CP 安装参数生成页面</a></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hestiacp/hestiacp/release/install/hst-install.sh
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#如果国内服务器无法下载的话,也可以用我提供的镜像来下载</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">wget https://mirror.jiyanjiyu.com/hestiacp/hestiacp/release/install/hst-install.sh
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#这里的命令用官方提供的安装参数生成页面来生成</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">bash hst-install.sh --port <span class="m">2083</span> --apache no --named no --mysql no --mysql8 yes --exim no --dovecot no --clamav no --spamassassin no --iptables no --fail2ban no --api no --interactive no</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>安装完成后有以下提示</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">Please install an MTA on this system <span class="k">if</span> you want to use sendmail!
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Congratulations!
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">You have successfully installed Hestia Control Panel on your server.
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Ready to get started? Log in using the following credentials:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> Admin URL: https://&lt;your host name&gt;:&lt;your port&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> Backup URL: https://&lt;your host ip&gt;:&lt;your port&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> Username: admin
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> Password: The password you chose during installation.
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Thank you <span class="k">for</span> choosing Hestia Control Panel to power your full stack web server,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">we hope that you enjoy using it as much as we <span class="k">do</span>!
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Please feel free to contact us at any <span class="nb">time</span> <span class="k">if</span> you have any questions,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">or <span class="k">if</span> you encounter any bugs or problems:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Documentation: https://docs.hestiacp.com/
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Forum: https://forum.hestiacp.com/
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">GitHub: https://www.github.com/hestiacp/hestiacp
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Note: Automatic updates are enabled by default. If you would like to disable them,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">please log in and navigate to Server &gt; Updates to turn them off.
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Help support the Hestia Control Panel project by donating via PayPal:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">https://www.hestiacp.com/donate
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">--
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Sincerely yours,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">The Hestia Control Panel development team
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Made with love <span class="p">&amp;</span> pride by the open-source community around the world.
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">[</span> ! <span class="o">]</span> IMPORTANT: You must restart the system before continuing!</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>重启服务器</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">reboot</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<p>然后你可以访问上面的面板地址来管理服务器了.
如果无法访问.你可能还需要在VPS后台打开 80 443 8023(HCP默认管理端口)或者自定的端口.</p>
<div class="details admonition tip open">
 <div class="details-summary admonition-title">
 <i class="icon fa-solid fa-lightbulb fa-fw" aria-hidden="true"></i>Cloudflare<i class="details-icon fa-solid fa-angle-right fa-fw" aria-hidden="true"></i>
 </div>
 <div class="details-content">
 <div class="admonition-content"><p>如果你的域名是用Cloudflare来解析的,那么你需要将Hestia CP的管理端口进行变更,因为CF并不允许使用8083端口。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo su -
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">v-change-sys-port <span class="m">2083</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>使用 Cloudflare 源服务器SSL 可以获得长达 15 年有效期的证书，而且在相当长的一段时间内不需要担心更新证书</p>
<p>你可以按照以下方式将 Cloudflare 证书授权添加到你的服务器</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-bash" data-lang="bash"><span class="line"><span class="cl">sudo su -
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">wget https://developers.cloudflare.com/ssl/static/origin_ca_rsa_root.pem
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">mv origin_ca_rsa_root.pem origin_ca_rsa_root.crt
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">cp origin_ca_rsa_root.crt /usr/local/share/ca-certificates
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">update-ca-certificates</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></div>
 </div>
 </div>

item.title: 在Windows Git Bash中安装Zsh以及oh My Zsh
item.description:
<p><a href="https://dominikrys.com/posts/zsh-in-git-bash-on-windows/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">https://dominikrys.com/posts/zsh-in-git-bash-on-windows/</a></p>
<p>最近开始重新使用Windows。<br>
之前在macOS和Linux上使用定制的Zsh shell很长时间，相当顺手。
那么在Windows中我们可以在Git Bash中设置Zsh来代替Bash。
在这篇文章中来看看如何解决</p>
<p><strong>在Git Bash中安装Zsh</strong></p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>从MSYS2包存储库下载最新的<a href="https://packages.msys2.org/package/zsh?repo=msys&amp;variant=x86_64"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">MSYS2 zsh</a>包，例如<code>zsh-5.8-5-x86_64.pkg.tar.zst</code>。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>安装能打开ZST归档的提取器，如<a href="https://peazip.github.io/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">PeaZip</a>或<a href="https://www.7-zip.org/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">7-Zip Beta</a>。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>将归档内容（包括etc和usr文件夹）解压到Git Bash安装目录下，通常是<code>C:\Program Files\Git</code>。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>打开Git Bash并运行：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 通过代理</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">export</span> <span class="n">http_proxy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">http</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="o">//</span><span class="mf">127.0</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="mf">0.1</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="mi">10809</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">export</span> <span class="n">https_proxy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">http</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="o">//</span><span class="mf">127.0</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="mf">0.1</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="mi">10809</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">zsh</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>重要：在Zsh首次使用向导中配置标签补全和历史记录。如果没有出现或你跳过了它，重新运行：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">autoload</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="n">U</span> <span class="n">zsh</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">newuser</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">install</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">zsh</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">newuser</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">install</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="n">f</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>配置历史记录，按1，更改值，然后按0。配置补全，按2选择“使用新的补全系统”，然后按0。按0保存设置。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>通过在<code>~/.bashrc</code>文件中添加以下内容，将Zsh配置为默认shell：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">if [ -t 1 ]; then
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> exec zsh
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">fi</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>设置 SSH 连接超时时间</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">vim ~/.ssh/config</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-vim" data-lang="vim"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">Host</span> *
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#<span class="nx">每</span> <span class="m">60</span> <span class="nx">秒发送一次保活信号到服务器</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">ServerAliveInterval</span> <span class="m">60</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#<span class="nx">在没有收到任何服务器响应的情况下</span>，<span class="nx">最多发送86400次保活信号</span>。
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nx">ServerAliveCountMax</span> <span class="m">86400</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ol>
<p><strong>安装oh-my-zsh</strong></p>
<p>此时，Git Bash将基本上像Unix Zsh shell一样运行。安装oh-my-zsh，运行：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">sh</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="n">c</span> <span class="s2">&#34;$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)&#34;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p><strong>安装插件和主题</strong></p>
<p>使用oh-my-zsh的安装方法安装插件和主题。我安装了Powerlevel10k主题和以下插件，并确认它们有效：</p>
<ul>
<li>zsh-completions</li>
<li>zsh-syntax-highlighting</li>
<li>zsh-autosuggestions</li>
</ul>
<p>注意：你可能在终端中遇到奇怪的图形和间距问题，特别是在版本v0.7.0。使用版本v0.6.4解决此问题：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">cd ~/.oh-my-zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git checkout tags/v0.6.4 -b v0.6.4-branch</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p><strong>修复输出错乱</strong></p>
<p>Windows可能会破坏UTF-8编码文本，导致终端中显示异常字符（更多信息见Stack Overflow的回答）。在<code>~/.bashrc</code>文件中添加以下内容修复此问题，最好在设置shell为Zsh的代码之前：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">/c/Windows/System32/chcp.com 65001 &gt; /dev/null 2&gt;&amp;1</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p><strong>故障排除</strong></p>
<p>fworks的指南相当活跃，值得搜索或询问任何</p>
<h3 id="参考文档" class="heading-element"><span>参考文档</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%82%e8%80%83%e6%96%87%e6%a1%a3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><a href="https://dominikrys.com/posts/zsh-in-git-bash-on-windows/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Installing Zsh (and oh-my-zsh) in Windows Git Bash</a></p>

item.title: WebStack-Hugo搭建导航站点
item.description:
<h2 id="安装部署" class="heading-element"><span>安装部署</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85%e9%83%a8%e7%bd%b2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>首先 fork <a href="https://github.com/shenweiyan/NavBioIT.git"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">NavBioIT</a> 项目</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-powershell" data-lang="powershell"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c">#假设站点文件保存在 D:\sites 下</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">D:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">cd </span><span class="n">D:</span><span class="p">\</span><span class="n">sites</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c"># 使用你自己的仓库地址替换</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">git</span> <span class="n">clone</span> <span class="p">-</span><span class="n">-recursive</span> <span class="n">https</span><span class="err">:</span><span class="p">//</span><span class="n">github</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">com</span><span class="p">/&lt;</span><span class="n">your_name</span><span class="p">&gt;/&lt;</span><span class="n">your_repo_name</span><span class="p">&gt;.</span><span class="n">git</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-powershell" data-lang="powershell"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">cd </span><span class="p">&lt;</span><span class="n">your_repo_name</span><span class="p">&gt;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c">#使用主题中包含的站点实例数据</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c">#/E：复制目录和子目录，包括空的。 /H：复制隐藏和系统文件。 /Y：覆盖现有文件而不提示。</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">xcopy</span> <span class="p">/</span><span class="n">E</span> <span class="p">/</span><span class="nb">H </span><span class="p">/</span><span class="n">Y</span> <span class="n">themes</span><span class="p">\</span><span class="nb">WebStack-Hugo</span><span class="p">\</span><span class="n">exampleSite</span><span class="p">\*</span> <span class="p">.</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="数据更新" class="heading-element"><span>数据更新</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e6%9b%b4%e6%96%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>将 YAML 格式的站点数据转换为 Excel 表格</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#pip install pyyaml pandas openpyxl</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">yaml</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">pandas</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="nn">pd</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">def</span> <span class="nf">read_yaml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file_path</span><span class="p">):</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">with</span> <span class="nb">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;r&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s1">&#39;utf-8&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">file</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">yaml</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">safe_load</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">def</span> <span class="nf">yaml_to_dataframe</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">yaml_data</span><span class="p">):</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">rows</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">id_counter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="c1"># 初始化 id 计数器</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">category</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">yaml_data</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">taxonomy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">category</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">icon</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">category</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;icon&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">term_group</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">category</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;list&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]):</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">term</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">term_group</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;term&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">link</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">term_group</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;links&#39;</span><span class="p">]:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;title&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">description</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;description&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;url&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">logo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;logo&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">rows</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">id_counter</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">taxonomy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">logo</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">icon</span><span class="p">])</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">id_counter</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="c1"># 递增 id</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">DataFrame</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rows</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">columns</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;id&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;is_use&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;term&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;title&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;description&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;url&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;logo&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;icon&#39;</span><span class="p">])</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># YAML 文件路径</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">yaml_file_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s1">&#39;./../data/webstack.yml&#39;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 读取 YAML 文件</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">yaml_data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">read_yaml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">yaml_file_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 转换为 DataFrame</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">df</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">yaml_to_dataframe</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">yaml_data</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 输出到 Excel 文件</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">excel_file_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s1">&#39;./sites.xlsx&#39;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">df</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">to_excel</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">excel_file_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>Excel表格编辑完成后生成YAML数据</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">pandas</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="nn">pd</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">yaml</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 读取数据并筛选</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">df</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_excel</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;sites.xlsx&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">df</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">df</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">df</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;is_use&#34;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 构建 taxonomy 和 icon 的映射</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">taxonomy_icon_dict</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">df</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">drop_duplicates</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">set_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="s1">&#39;icon&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">to_dict</span><span class="p">()</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 构建一级菜单</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">all_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[{</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">taxonomy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;icon&#39;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">icon</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;list&#39;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[]}</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">taxonomy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">icon</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">taxonomy_icon_dict</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">()]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 构建二级菜单项</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">group</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">df</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">groupby</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;term&#39;</span><span class="p">):</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">links</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">group</span><span class="p">[[</span><span class="s1">&#39;title&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;logo&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;url&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;description&#39;</span><span class="p">]]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">to_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">orient</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s1">&#39;records&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">term_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;term&#39;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;links&#39;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">links</span><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># 找到对应的一级菜单并添加</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">taxonomy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">group</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">iloc</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">all_list</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;taxonomy&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">taxonomy</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;list&#39;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">term_item</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 输出到 YAML</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">with</span> <span class="nb">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;webstack.yml&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;w&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;utf8&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">yaml</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">all_list</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">allow_unicode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">default_flow_style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sort_keys</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>爬取站点favicon图标 get_favicons.py</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span><span class="lnt">39
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#pip install pandas openpyxl requests pillow</span>
